de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.operator

Class PlusAssignment

  • java.lang.Object

  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionStatement, ExpressionContainer, LoopInitializer, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, SVSubstitute

    public class PlusAssignment
extends Assignment
    Addition or string concatenation assignment "+=".

    • Constructor Detail

      • PlusAssignment

        public PlusAssignment(ExtList children)
        Plus assignment.
        Parameters:
        children - an ExtList with all children of this node the first children in list will be the one on the left side, the second the one on the right side.
